title: Ipomoea modesta
taxonomy: Ipomoea modesta is classified in the family Convolvulaceae and the order Convolvulales. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta. Additionally, it is classified as a species of flowering plant within the genus Ipomoea. Ipomoea modesta is a member of the class Magnoliopsida. This classification indicates its position within the plant kingdom's taxonomic hierarchy.
